title: Zanzibari Poffertjes with Light Silky Sauce
description: A simple yet elegant dessert featuring poffertjes with a zanzibari inspired sauce, topped with a silky light whipped cream.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick poffertjes pan or a regular pan with a small amount of butter.
Combine poffertjes mix, zanzibari spice blend, and 1 tbsp of unsalted butter in a bowl.
Add large eggs and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Gradually add 3/4 cup of granulated sugar and mix until combined.
Pour the batter into the preheated pan and cook until the poffertjes are golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whip the light cream until stiff peaks form.
Add the remaining 1/4 cup of granulated sugar and whip until combined.
To assemble the dessert, place 2-3 poffertjes on a plate, top with a dollop of light whipped cream, and drizzle with the silky sauce (optional).
If desired, top with rich whipped cream and a sprinkle of zanzibari spice blend.
